required_evidence: Approved intended-use statement report boundaries and prohibited clinical language
caveat: Current claim is candidate-only and not ready for clinical reporting.

required_evidence: Documented wet-lab input assumptions bioinformatics workflow versions references containers and provenance
blocking_dependency: containerized production workflow and version lock
caveat: Phase 3 proves mechanics but not a locked production workflow.

required_evidence: Raw data provenance sample identity pairing requirements checksum/read integrity and minimum input quality criteria
blocking_dependency: Diana-independent raw-input validation fixtures and reviewer thresholds
caveat: Diana-specific raw inventory remains outside this non-Diana loop.

required_evidence: Truth-set recall precision normalization and filtering performance for tumor-normal small variants
caveat: SEQC2 mechanics are not enough to lock clinical feature accuracy.

section_title: Accuracy for CNV/LOH and scar features
required_evidence: Allele-specific CNV/LOH reciprocal-overlap performance purity/ploidy behavior and scarHRD input validation
blocking_dependency: HG008 and COLO829 CNV/LOH fixtures plus primary CNV tool validation
caveat: Coverage CNV bins are not allele-specific segments.

section_title: Accuracy for SV and rearrangement features
required_evidence: Validated SV caller VCF/BEDPE reciprocal-overlap performance and feature extraction QC
blocking_dependency: HG008 and COLO829 SV fixtures plus primary SV caller validation
caveat: BAM evidence counters are not a validated SV caller.

section_title: Signature and integrated HRD model accuracy
required_evidence: Known-answer signature guardrails model calibration threshold behavior and no-call performance
blocking_dependency: SigProfiler/CHORD/HRDetect/scarHRD adapter validation and locked thresholds
caveat: All HRD interpretation adapters remain explicit no-calls.

required_evidence: Same-sample same-run replicate stability for core feature classes and final no-call/call behavior
blocking_dependency: replicate fixture design and approved local/cloud execution
caveat: No replicate precision study has been run.

required_evidence: Cross-run cross-environment reproducibility with frozen containers references and configuration
blocking_dependency: container lock and reproducibility fixture execution
caveat: Local code tests do not substitute for production reproducibility validation.

section_title: Limit of detection and tumor fraction sensitivity
required_evidence: Tumor fraction/purity dilution sensitivity tables and no-call thresholds
blocking_dependency: COLO829 purity series or approved dilution material execution
caveat: Purity stress fixtures are planned but not run.

required_evidence: Locked feature classes genomic scope exclusions no-call criteria and reportable input constraints
blocking_dependency: known-answer validation and clinical boundary approval
caveat: Reportable range is explicitly not locked.

required_evidence: Reference-build mismatches contamination low coverage low tumor purity artifacts missing inputs and unsupported feature classes
blocking_dependency: validated failure-mode fixtures and reviewer policy
caveat: Failure-mode language is scaffolded but not validated.

required_evidence: Per-stage QC thresholds for input BAM/VCF/CNV/SV/signature/report generation
blocking_dependency: known-answer benchmarks plus reviewer threshold approval

required_evidence: Approved report language no-call wording prohibited terms and signoff fields
blocking_dependency: clinical reviewer and laboratory director approval
caveat: No-call language exists but is not approved for clinical reporting.

required_evidence: Version-lock policy validation impact assessment revalidation triggers and audit trail
blocking_dependency: production release and validation governance process
caveat: Change-control process is not yet implemented.

required_evidence: Named reviewer/lab-director approvals validation date and release decision
blocking_dependency: completed validation evidence and formal signoff
